name: Reflex Plus Adult Cat Food Canned - Chicken Chunks in Gravy 400g
description: The Reflex Plus Pâté Chicken Adult Cat Food offers high nutritional value and excellent digestibility thanks to quality animal protein and a diverse vitamin profile. Its rich moisture content supports daily hydration and assists kidney health. Key Benefits: High‑quality animal & fish‑derived proteins for digestibility Diverse vitamin and mineral mix to support overall health Elevated moisture content to bolster hydration and renal/urinary support Carefully formulated for adult cats’ nutritional needs Ingredients: Meat and animal derivatives (Chicken 4%), Cereals, Minerals, Derivatives of plant origin, Various sugars. Nutritional Components Crude protein 8.5% Fat content 5% Crude fiber 0.5% Raw ash 2.5% Moisture Content 82% Nutritional Additives Nutritional supplements: Vitamin A 1875 IU, Vitamin D3 250 IU, Vitamin E 35 mg, Taurine 500 mg. Trace Elements: 3b605 (Zinc 14mg/kg), 3b103 (Iron 10mg/kg), 3b405 (Copper 1.5mg/kg), 3b503 (Manganese 2.5mg/kg), 3b202 (Iodine 0.4mg/kg), 3b801 (Selenium 0.025mg/kg). Nutritional Recommendation Serve at room temperature. • Clean, fresh drinking water should always be available. • If this food is new to your cat, introduce it gradually over a few days. • The exact amount of food for your cat may vary depending on many factors such as age, breed, weight, sex, and activity level. • Not suitable for human use.
